arcs.title: Scorched Wind
arcs.summary: A dry front rolls in. Supplies spoil faster and tempers rise. Expect conflict over fuel and water.
arcs.cta: Post a faction update and mark any critical supply lines.

arcs.title: Shattered Signal
arcs.summary: Radio channels degrade. Only fragments of comms get through. Paranoia grows as intel dries up.
arcs.cta: Share last‑known intel and set up a relay plan.

arcs.title: Silent Truce
arcs.summary: Major groups agree to a temporary ceasefire. The calm feels unnatural.
arcs.cta: Use this window to rebuild or reposition.

arcs.title: Broken Road
arcs.summary: Key routes are compromised by hordes. Travel becomes a coordinated operation.
arcs.cta: Organize a convoy and share map intel.
